message:
Implement comprehensive INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE builders (sqlmodel_rust-6vd.3)

- Add RETURNING clause support for all builders
- Add InsertManyBuilder for bulk inserts
- Add ON CONFLICT (UPSERT) support: do_nothing, do_update, target_do_update
- Add explicit SET method for UpdateBuilder
- Add from_model() for DeleteBuilder
- Add insert_many! macro
- Add comprehensive test suite with mock TestHero model

Build verification blocked by external asupersync dependency error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
